  id={undefined}

  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Returns a success code"},"403":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"The user does not have permission to add this data source type"},"406":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"The data source type with the given name already exists"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Internal error that prevented the addition of the data source type"}}}
>
